description_long: This is a rustic wooden fence composed of four uneven, horizontally stacked rails, each with a natural, wavy contour that gives the structure a handcrafted appearance. The fence is supported by two sturdy vertical posts at either end, each topped with a decorative lantern-style cap that features a metallic base and a glass-like enclosure. The wood has a medium brown finish, with visible grain patterns that enhance its organic look. The lantern caps add a touch of urban sophistication, making the fence suitable for parks, residential gardens, or urban walkways. The rails are spaced closely enough to act as a barrier, but the irregular shapes create visual interest and a less formal boundary. There are no gates or additional decorative elements beyond the lantern caps.
description: A rustic wooden fence with four wavy rails and lantern-style caps on each end post, featuring a natural brown finish and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the fence, four wavy rails, and both lantern-topped posts.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the fence and the lantern cap's shape.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same four rails and lantern-topped posts visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and lantern cap details.
